home.heroSubtitle: Elevate your natural glow with expert dermacosmetics, artistic makeup, and personalized skincare treatments.
home.servicesSubtitle: Tailored beauty and skincare solutions for your specific needs, crafted with artistic precision.
home.packagesSubtitle: Curated bundles for optimal beauty results.

admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.subtitle: Business management
admin.dashboardSubtitle: Here's a quick summary of your business. Real data will appear once you start receiving appointments.

emptyStates.noUpcomingDesc: When you book the first appointment it will appear here.

media.title: Media library
media.description: Upload and organize all the images used across your website.

settings.title: Site settings
settings.description: Configure your site name, contact info, social links and behaviors.

general.title: General information
general.description: Basic site data and booking policies.

contact.title: Contact details
contact.description: Information visible to clients to reach you.

social.title: Social media
social.description: Full URLs of your profiles (leave empty if you don't use one).

features.title: Site features
features.description: Enable or disable entire sections based on your business.
features.blogDesc: When active, posts are visible at /blog
features.offersDesc: When active, /offers section shows current promotions
features.loyaltyDesc: When active, clients accumulate points on purchases

maintenance.title: Maintenance mode
maintenance.description: Temporarily block access to the public site.
maintenance.modeDesc: Public site will show a message instead of normal content

profile.title: Professional profile
profile.description: Information shown on the 'About me' section.
profile.imageDesc: Image displayed next to your bio.
profile.bioDesc: Your story, experience and philosophy. Shown in the 'About me' section.
profile.signatureDesc: A short line at the end of the bio (optional).

credentials.title: Professional credentials
credentials.editDescription: Modify the data for this certification.
credentials.createDescription: Add a certification or course to your credentials.
credentials.emptyDesc: Add your certifications, courses and training here.

carousel.title: Home carousel
carousel.createDescription: Add a new slide to the homepage carousel.
carousel.emptyDesc: Create your first slide for the homepage carousel.

services.title: Services
services.description: Manage the services you offer: prices, duration, extras.
services.createDescription: Define a new service with its optional extras.
services.editDescription: Modify the data, image and extras of the service.
services.extrasDescription: Additional services or materials the client can add to the main service.
services.emptyDesc: Create your first service to start offering bookings.
services.confirmDelete: Delete this service? Its extras will be lost.

packages.title: Packages
packages.description: Bundle several services with special pricing for your clients.
packages.createDescription: Group several services in a package with its own price.
packages.itemsDescription: Select which services form part of the package.
packages.itemsDescriptionCard: Define which services are included and in what quantity.
packages.emptyDesc: Create packages combining services (e.g. Bridal, Birthday, Monthly).

login.signInPrompt: Sign in to your account to continue
login.genericError: Something went wrong, please try again
login.securityNote: Your session is stored securely with encryption.

booking.title: Book appointment
booking.successMessage: We sent you an email with the appointment details.
